allow: Bash(curl -s -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}' -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/vapi/webhook -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'x-vapi-signature: placeholder' -d '{"message":{"type":"transcript","transcriptType":"final","role":"user","transcript":"I have crushing chest pain that started 20 minutes ago.","call":{"assistantOverrides":{"variableValues":{"sessionId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"}}}}}')

Bash(curl -s -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}' -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/vapi/webhook -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":{"type":"function-call","functionCall":{"name":"log_symptom","parameters":{"name":"chest pain","severity":"severe","duration":"20 minutes","notes":"radiates to left arm, with diaphoresis"}},"call":{"assistantOverrides":{"variableValues":{"sessionId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"}}}}}')

Bash(curl -s -w '\\nHTTP %{http_code}' -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/vapi/webhook -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":{"type":"function-call","functionCall":{"name":"submit_triage_assessment","parameters":{"tier":"clinic","chief_complaint":"Chest pain with arm radiation","reasoning":"Patient reports chest pain radiating to left arm with sweating, duration 20 minutes.","recommended_actions":["See a doctor within 24 hours"],"red_flags_present":[]}},"call":{"assistantOverrides":{"variableValues":{"sessionId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"}}}}}')
